advisory.title: Sandbox escape via TOCTOU race in remote FS bridge readFile
advisory.description:
## Summary

Sandbox escape via TOCTOU race in remote FS bridge readFile.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix

Fixed by commit `121870a08583033ed6a0ed73d9ffea32991252bb` (`fix(sandbox): pin remote fs bridge reads`).

introducingCommits.subject: feat: move ssh sandboxing into core

timeline.notes: The core remote FS bridge inherits the racy resolve-then-cat read path when SSH sandboxing moves into core. vulnerableHead stays on the last pre-fix snapshot immediately before 121870a08583033ed6a0ed73d9ffea32991252bb.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should detect sandboxescape when scanning vulnerableHead.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_is_fix_parent
checks.details: Using parent 7ae1bb0c7799fd0cbd2d4de7b0f5b8039837ab8d of fix commit 121870a08583033ed6a0ed73d9ffea32991252bb as the last known vulnerable commit.
